extract: Charm has several referrals: For the move introduced in Generation II, see Charm (move). For the member of the Miss Fortunes in the Hisui region, see Charm (Hisui) For the Key Item charms, see Old Charm, Shiny Charm, Oval Charm, Exp. Charm, Mark Charm, Catching Charm, and Glimmering Charm. For the charms given by Lucille at the Folk Shrine in Jubilife Village, see Tempting Charm, Survival Charm, and Warding Charm. For the exploration team in the Pokémon Mystery Dungeon series, see Team Charm.
